FFlagSduiCleanupDataStoreApp.purpose: Enhances performance and reliability of app data management for players.

FFlagFoundationToastNotification_Staged.mechanism: Introduces a notification system for in-game alerts.
FFlagFoundationToastNotification_Staged.purpose: Keeps players informed about important updates or events while playing.

FFlagLoadRawBytecodeWithHashKey.mechanism: Enables loading of raw bytecode using a hash key for verification.
FFlagLoadRawBytecodeWithHashKey.purpose: Improves security and performance when loading scripts.

FFlagSduiCleanupDataStoreApp_Staged.mechanism: Cleans up data store applications in the SDUI system.
FFlagSduiCleanupDataStoreApp_Staged.purpose: Enhances user experience by ensuring outdated data is removed.

FFlagCancelDeferOnShutdown_Staged.mechanism: Allows cancellation of deferred tasks when the server is shutting down.
FFlagCancelDeferOnShutdown_Staged.purpose: Prevents unnecessary processing and improves shutdown efficiency.

DFFlagProductInfoBatchingEnabled2_Staged.mechanism: Enables batching of product information requests to reduce server load.
DFFlagProductInfoBatchingEnabled2_Staged.purpose: Speeds up the retrieval of product information for players.

DFFlagPMDHeaderBlockDetection_Staged.mechanism: Detects header blocks in PMD (Plugin Management Data) for better handling.
DFFlagPMDHeaderBlockDetection_Staged.purpose: Improves plugin stability and performance for developers.

DFFlagSimExecuteClientOnlyFallenParts.mechanism: Enables simulation of fallen parts only on the client side.
DFFlagSimExecuteClientOnlyFallenParts.purpose: Improves performance by reducing server load when parts fall.

DFFlagEnableModerationServiceImageVideo2.mechanism: Activates an enhanced moderation service for images and videos.
DFFlagEnableModerationServiceImageVideo2.purpose: Ensures a safer environment by better filtering inappropriate content.

FFlagTouchInputServicePinchRotateVelocit.mechanism: Adjusts the sensitivity of pinch and rotate gestures on touch devices.
FFlagTouchInputServicePinchRotateVelocit.purpose: Provides smoother and more responsive control for players using touch screens.

FFlagCreateAssetAsyncRefactor.mechanism: Refactors the process of creating assets to be asynchronous.
FFlagCreateAssetAsyncRefactor.purpose: Allows players to create assets without freezing the game, improving overall performance.

FFlagAppShortcutBarEnableButtonHoldStore.mechanism: Enables a feature where players can hold buttons on the app shortcut bar for additional options.

DFFlagLetRagdolledHumanoidsSleep_PlaceFi.purpose: Adds realism to gameplay by enabling characters to rest, enhancing immersion.

DFFlagPMDHeaderBlockDetection.purpose: Improves game stability and performance by preventing issues related to header blocks.

FIntRenderBufferTypeVertex.purpose: Improves the visual quality and performance of games, making them look better and run smoother.
